details.test: Task 1: Save cheapest dual-degree EMBA under $140,000
Task 2: Create first-year schedule with Downtown evening core courses
Task 3: Register for online EMBA info session in March 2025 (6pm or later)
Task 4: Estimate and save total cost for Global EMBA + MS Data Analytics
Task 5: Favorite two dual-degree EMBA scholarships worth at least $15,000
Task 6: Add Asia residency in June or July (7-10 days, <= $7,000) to plan
Task 7: Schedule 30-minute virtual consultation with North America tech advisor
Task 8: Save one senior tech-industry alumni in Europe (2019 or later) to contacts
Task 9: Begin dual-degree EMBA application for Fall 2025 and save at review stage
